items.title: A toddler needed a life-saving flight, and the insurer said no. Then Mark Cuban called
items.summary: Stella McMahon, 16 months old and fighting T-cell leukemia, needed a medical plane to Cincinnati for a federally funded study. Her insurer said no.

items.title: Influencer Alix Earle turned her worst insecurity into her first brand. This is her plan to monetize her 14 million followers and make it last
items.summary: The social media star with 14 million followers talks about the biggest mistakes she see brands making and how to make influencer marketing a success.

items.title: Trump extends his deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to April 6
items.summary: Trump once again chickened out, this time offering Iran an extension until April 6 to reopen the vital oil pathway.

items.title: ‘Intelligence may be scalable, but accountability is not’: A new report exposes the hidden cost of the AI agent revolution
items.summary: Accenture and Wharton mapped AI’s impact across 18 industries, concluding: The smarter your agents get, the more irreplaceable your best humans become.

items.title: Southeast Asia could become a booming data center market if its data centers can beat the heat
items.summary: “You can’t ignore the fact that 85% of the world’s population lives outside temperate regions,” says BDx Data Centers CEO Mayank Shrivastava.
